CROW Documentation
==================

**CROW** The LSST-DESC Cluster Reconstruction of Observables Workbench (CROW) code is a DESC tool consisting of a Python library for predicting galaxy cluster observabless.

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1
   :caption: Getting Started

   source/installation
   source/overview

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 1
   :caption: Reference

   api
